sections.paragraph:
- Original: Γεθσημανῆ

- Transliteration: Gethsemane

- Phonetic: gheth-say-man-ay'

- Definition: Gethsemane = "an oil press"

- Origin: of Aramaic origin, cf H1660 and H8081

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of Chaldee origin (compare [H1660] and [H8081]); oil press; Gethsemane a garden near Jerusalem: - Gethsemane.
